leadText: The Rotom Catalog (Japanese: ロトムのカタログ Rotom Catalog) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Rotom Catalog allows the player to change the form of a Rotom . In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , Rotom must have been in a form in Rotom's Room at least once to unlock that form in the Rotom Catalog. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , and Pokémon Legends: Z-A , all forms are already unlocked upon receiving the item.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP S V ZA A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalog to have Rotom hop in and out of the various devices listed within.

In Pokémon Sword and Shield , Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , and Pokémon Legends: Z-A , all forms are already unlocked upon receiving the item. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Wyndon (from League Staff Isaac after defeating him) BD SP Rotom's Room (automatically obtained after letting Rotom enter an appliance) S V Porto Marinada auction (if the player owns a Rotom ) ZA MD Given by Lyons in Side Mission 170: "Rotom Showcase!"
